purpose: Small capability discovery manifest for Complex. Availability must still be probed in the current Codex surface.

capabilities.name: complex_runtime_repo_skill
capabilities.use_when: A project is asked to use Complex, design a project contract, or run long-form continuous work.
capabilities.boundary: The workflow entry is .agents/skills/complex-runtime/SKILL.md or its user-level installation. protocol/core.md is the normative reference; protocol/current-state.md is maintainer-only.
capabilities.verification_hint: Confirm the skill is discoverable from the target-project task before copying or rereading protocol files.

capabilities.name: runtime_harness_capability_discovery
capabilities.use_when: A beat may benefit from tools, skills, MCP, browser, API, subagents, worktrees, threads, or automation.
capabilities.boundary: Discover just in time. Codex primitives and Complex conventions remain distinct; project-internal topology fit does not require user permission.
capabilities.verification_hint: Record selected capability, observable resource evidence, degraded route, and side-effect boundary.

capabilities.name: conditional_operating_organization
capabilities.use_when: A long project has recurring responsibilities, independent evaluation, or multiple modules that cannot be managed by one simple route.
capabilities.boundary: Standing lanes are responsibilities, not automatically threads. Use only the lanes that recur; ordinary projects stay with the kernel.
capabilities.verification_hint: Compare duplicate work, correction count, and artifact lead time against a simpler topology.

capabilities.name: reference_implementation_transfer
capabilities.use_when: A mechanism-level route, structure, method, evaluation, prompt default, or protocol contract changes.
capabilities.boundary: Pin and inspect implementations, reproduce when meaningful, compare on the same task, transfer reversibly, and never treat upstream success as Complex validation.

capabilities.name: structured_behavior_evaluation
capabilities.use_when: A behavior or mechanism is compared, promoted, demoted, or claimed to improve a project outcome.
capabilities.boundary: Markers screen only. Lock eval case, baseline/candidate runs, scorer, limits, and one changed variable before comparison.
capabilities.verification_hint: Run tools/check_eval_records.py and keep raw private transcripts outside the active repository.

capabilities.name: recovery_anchor_inspection
capabilities.use_when: A target project has large, missing, stale, or conflicting recovery state.
capabilities.boundary: The extractor bounds content; it does not choose authority or import Complex maintenance state into the target project.
capabilities.verification_hint: Use tools/inspect_recovery_anchor.py with a project-specific envelope and a clean evaluator.

capabilities.name: browser_or_institutional_access
capabilities.use_when: Public sources are insufficient and a database, institutional account, or logged-in browser is required.
capabilities.boundary: Credentials and account actions remain user-owned; the agent should prepare the exact source, field, and return path before asking.
capabilities.verification_hint: Record the inaccessible source, required action, expected returned evidence, and continuation command.

capabilities.name: document_or_render_qa
capabilities.use_when: The deliverable is a Word document, PDF, slide deck, image, website, or other rendered artifact.
capabilities.boundary: Rendering support varies by environment; do not claim visual QA without fresh render evidence.
capabilities.verification_hint: Record source/render freshness, output path, visual evidence, and residual warnings.
